items.example: Conservation of natural habitats is essential for protecting wildlife.
Plastics cause a lot of damage to the environment.
The government has introduced new environmental regulations.
Many species are at risk of extinction due to climate change.
Deforestation destroys the natural habitat of countless animals.
The entire ecosystem depends on the delicate balance between predators and prey.
The giant panda is no longer classified as an endangered species.
Dinosaurs became extinct millions of years ago.
Poachers kill elephants for their ivory tusks.
Lions are apex predators at the top of the food chain.
The rabbit is a common prey for foxes.
Birds migrate south for the winter.
Climate change is making it difficult for some animals to reproduce.
Some animals seem to have an instinctive fear of water.
Endangered animals can be bred in captivity and then returned to the wild.
